offer: For construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month, inefficient compliance processes cause regulatory penalties. We automate OSHA compliance summaries instead of manual compliance documentation and filing.
problem: Difficulty in generating and filing OSHA compliance summaries efficiently.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on compliance tools
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Share insights in construction forums and groups
try_it: Let users try template-based summary generation and dashboard for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
